title: Refactor OCP-015 (OCP): The constructor contains a large switch statement dispatching on 'result.getR...
apply_error: syntax check failed: unresolved patch/conflict marker '=======' in extras/catch_amalgamated.cpp

detected_issue.description: The constructor contains a large switch statement dispatching on 'result.getResultType()'.
detected_issue.reasoning: Adding a new type of assertion result (new 'ResultWas::OfType' enum value) would require modifying this switch statement in the constructor to add a new case, violating the Open/Closed Principle. The initialization logic for different result types should be extensible without modifying existing code, perhaps by using a factory or polymorphic initialization.

fix_logic.summary: Refactor ConsoleAssertionPrinter to use a strategy-based approach for result type handling
fix_logic.rationale: Replaced the large switch statement in the constructor with a helper method that encapsulates the logic for each ResultWas type, making the class easier to extend without modifying the constructor.
